meta_title: Roofing in Laud Lakes, FL | Premier Impact Windows & Roofing
meta_description: Premier Impact Windows & Roofing installs hurricane-rated roofing in Laud Lakes, FL. CertainTeed shingles & West Lake tile. Licensed, A+ BBB. Free estimate — from $87/mo.
h1: Trusted Roofing Replacement & Repair in Laud Lakes, Florida
intro:
Laud Lakes homeowners know what South Florida weather demands — and an aging or under-performing roof is one of the most serious vulnerabilities a home can have. Nestled in the heart of Broward County at ZIP code 33319, Laud Lakes sits just eight miles from the Atlantic coastline, close enough that tropical systems bring sustained winds, torrential downpours, and sustained roof-loading pressure that can expose every weakness in an aging shingle or tile system. With roughly 55% of homes in the area built before 1994 — many of them predating the sweeping post-Hurricane Andrew code reforms — a significant portion of Laud Lakes roofs were never designed to meet today's wind-resistance standards. If your home is among them, the question isn't whether your roof needs attention; it's how soon.

The neighborhoods that make up Laud Lakes, including the established residential streets of Lauderdale Lakes North near Lake Side Park, are filled with single-family homes averaging around $270,000 in value. That kind of investment deserves a roof that can stand up to a 170 mph wind zone designation — the official rating assigned to this part of Broward County under the Florida Building Code. While Laud Lakes falls outside the High-Velocity Hurricane Zone (HVHZ) that covers coastal Miami-Dade, it still requires hurricane-rated roofing products and installations that meet strict Broward County standards. Anything less leaves your home and your equity exposed.

At Premier Impact Windows & Roofing, we've spent decades helping Broward County homeowners protect and upgrade their properties with full roof replacements and targeted repairs. Whether you're dealing with visible storm damage, granule loss on aging shingles, cracked tile, or simply a roof that's well past its useful life, our fully in-house crews — carrying 60+ years of combined experience — are ready to assess your situation and build a solution that holds up for decades to come. We're not just contractors; we're your neighbors, and we treat every Laud Lakes home like it's our own.

section_why.h2: Why Laud Lakes Homeowners Choose Premier Impact Windows & Roofing for Their Roofing Needs
section_why.body:
When it comes to replacing or repairing a roof in Laud Lakes, the contractor you choose matters as much as the materials you select. Premier Impact Windows & Roofing has earned an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau and completed more than 500 homes across Palm Beach, Broward, and Miami-Dade counties — not by cutting corners, but by delivering the kind of craftsmanship and customer care that generates referrals long after the job is done. We call ourselves 'The Kings of Service' because that standard applies from the moment you call us to the final inspection signed off by the Broward County Building Division.

One of the most important distinctions that sets Premier Impact Windows & Roofing apart is our 100% in-house installation model. We never subcontract your roof to unknown crews. Every technician who steps onto your Laud Lakes home is a trained, vetted member of our own team — fully licensed, insured, and accountable to our internal quality standards. That means consistent workmanship, direct communication, and a crew that takes genuine pride in the finished product. It also means there's no finger-pointing between a general contractor and a subcontractor if a question arises after installation.

Our experience throughout Broward County means we understand the specific permitting requirements, inspection protocols, and code nuances that apply to your address. We handle the entire permit process through the Broward County Building Division on your behalf, so you never have to navigate municipal bureaucracy alone. From initial measurement and material selection to final county inspection, Premier Impact Windows & Roofing manages every step. Our clients in the Lauderdale Lakes North area and surrounding communities consistently tell us that the process was smoother and faster than they expected — and the results speak for themselves.

We also understand that roofing is a significant investment for Laud Lakes families. That's why we offer flexible financing options starting as low as $87 per month with $0 down, making it possible to address urgent roofing needs without waiting until damage compounds. A new hurricane-rated roof isn't just a home improvement — it's one of the highest-return investments a South Florida homeowner can make, and we're here to make it accessible.

section_history.h2: Laud Lakes Has Seen the Storms — Here's What That Means for Your Roof
section_history.body:
Laud Lakes has endured no fewer than nine named tropical systems since 1990, and the damage patterns from those storms have shaped how the entire region thinks about roofing. Hurricane Andrew in 1992 was the event that changed everything. Andrew's catastrophic winds — well above 150 mph at its core — obliterated thousands of roofs across Broward and Miami-Dade counties and exposed how poorly many pre-code homes were built. The aftermath led directly to the sweeping reforms in the Florida Building Code that now govern every roofing installation in the state. Homes built before 1994 in Laud Lakes, which account for more than half the housing stock, predate those reforms and may still carry roofing systems that were never upgraded to modern standards.

Hurricane Wilma in 2005 served as a painful reminder that South Florida's interior communities are not immune to serious wind events. Wilma struck Broward County with sustained winds exceeding 110 mph, generating widespread roof damage, torn flashing, displaced tiles, and shingle blow-off across inland neighborhoods just like Laud Lakes. Many homeowners who thought their roofs were in acceptable condition discovered otherwise when Wilma peeled back their defenses. Then Hurricane Irma in 2017 brought another round of wind and water intrusion damage, with many insurance claims in the 33319 ZIP code tied directly to roofing failures on homes where deferred maintenance had quietly become a liability.

The cumulative lesson from Andrew, Wilma, Irma, and the six other significant storms since 1990 is simple: in Laud Lakes, a roof is not a passive structure. It is an active line of defense against forces that return with regularity. Investing in a properly rated, properly installed roof is not optional for homeowners who want to protect their families, their belongings, and a home worth $270,000 or more.

section_code.h2: Florida Building Code Requirements for Roofing in Laud Lakes and Broward County
section_code.body:
Laud Lakes falls under the jurisdiction of the Broward County Building Division and is subject to the Florida Building Code (FBC), which sets some of the most rigorous roofing construction standards in the United States. While Laud Lakes is not located within the High-Velocity Hurricane Zone — the HVHZ designation that applies to coastal portions of Miami-Dade and Broward counties — it still sits in a 170 mph wind design zone. That classification means all roofing products and installation methods must be tested and approved to resist wind uplift forces consistent with that rating. Generic or out-of-code materials simply cannot be used on a Laud Lakes home, regardless of price.

Under the current Florida Building Code (7th Edition), roofing replacements in Broward County require permits for all full replacements and most significant repairs. The permit process through the Broward County Building Division includes plan review, material approval, and at least one field inspection to confirm the installation meets code requirements. Proper nail patterns, underlayment specifications, drip edge installation, and hip and ridge fastening protocols are all inspected. Premier Impact Windows & Roofing handles this entire process on your behalf — submitting documentation, scheduling inspections, and ensuring that every phase of your project is fully compliant before it's considered complete.

For homes built before 1994, code compliance during a roof replacement can also trigger the requirement to bring certain related elements up to current standards, including proper deck attachment and secondary water barrier installation. These requirements exist for good reason: they dramatically improve a home's ability to survive high-wind events without catastrophic failure. Premier Impact Windows & Roofing's crews are thoroughly trained in these code-specific installation requirements, and we never take shortcuts that could jeopardize your permit approval or, more importantly, your roof's performance when the next storm arrives.

section_products.h2: CertainTeed and West Lake: Hurricane-Rated Roofing Products Built for Laud Lakes Homes
section_products.body:
Premier Impact Windows & Roofing installs two best-in-class roofing product lines that are ideally suited to the demands of the Laud Lakes climate and building code environment: CertainTeed architectural shingles and West Lake concrete and clay tile systems. These brands were selected specifically because they combine proven hurricane-resistance credentials with the aesthetic versatility and long-term durability that South Florida homeowners expect.

CertainTeed's Landmark Series architectural shingles are among the most respected products in the residential roofing industry, and for good reason. The Landmark line features a heavy dual-layered construction that resists wind uplift, impact, and algae discoloration — a common concern in the humid Broward County climate. CertainTeed Landmark shingles are rated for wind resistance up to 110 mph standard, with enhanced warranty options available for installations meeting Class F or Class H wind designations under the FBC. They carry a Class A fire rating and are manufactured to qualify for wind mitigation credits that can meaningfully reduce homeowner's insurance premiums in Florida. For Laud Lakes homeowners who want a clean, modern aesthetic without sacrificing performance, the CertainTeed Landmark Series is an outstanding choice.

For homeowners who prefer the look of traditional Florida tile roofing, West Lake concrete and clay tile systems offer exceptional durability and wind resistance within a product line purpose-built for the South Florida environment. West Lake tile is rigorously tested under Florida Product Approval protocols, making it fully compliant with Broward County requirements outside the HVHZ. Concrete tile offers a heavier, more impact-resistant profile, while clay tile provides a lighter option with a distinctive aesthetic that complements older and Mediterranean-style homes common in the Lauderdale Lakes North area. Both options, when installed over proper underlayment and with code-compliant fastening systems, provide a long-lasting roof that can withstand decades of South Florida weather.

section_cost.h2: What Does a New Roof Cost in Laud Lakes — And How Can You Finance It?
section_cost.body:
For homeowners in Laud Lakes where average home values sit around $270,000, understanding the cost and return on investment of a new roof is essential to making an informed decision. A full roof replacement in Broward County typically ranges from $8,000 to $20,000 or more depending on the size of the home, the roofing material selected, the complexity of the roof geometry, and whether any decking repairs or code upgrades are required. CertainTeed architectural shingle systems generally come in at the lower to mid range of that spectrum, while West Lake concrete or clay tile installations tend to carry a higher upfront cost but offer a longer service life and greater curb appeal enhancement.

For a $270,000 home, a properly installed new roof represents one of the highest-ROI improvements available to the homeowner. Real estate data consistently shows that a new roof increases resale value, reduces time on market, and removes a significant negotiating liability during the inspection process. Beyond resale value, a hurricane-rated roof in Florida directly reduces homeowner's insurance premiums through wind mitigation credits — savings that begin immediately and compound year after year. In many cases, Broward County homeowners see annual insurance savings of $500 to $1,500 or more after a qualifying roof replacement, which meaningfully offsets the project's total cost over time.

Premier Impact Windows & Roofing offers financing options that make a new roof accessible without waiting until storm damage forces the decision. With plans starting at $87 per month and $0 down options available for qualified homeowners, there's no reason to delay a roofing investment that protects your family and your equity. Our team will walk you through every financing option, help you understand your insurance benefits, and provide a transparent, itemized estimate so you always know exactly what you're getting and what you're paying.

section_insurance.h2: Insurance Savings and Wind Mitigation Benefits for Laud Lakes Roofing Upgrades
section_insurance.body:
One of the most compelling financial arguments for replacing an aging roof in Laud Lakes is the direct impact a new, code-compliant roof has on homeowner's insurance premiums. Florida insurers — including major carriers operating in Broward County such as Citizens Property Insurance, Universal Property & Casualty, and Heritage Insurance — are required to offer wind mitigation discounts to policyholders whose homes meet specific construction standards. A new roof installed with qualifying nail patterns, secondary water barriers, and wind-rated materials can generate substantial credits that reduce your annual premium significantly.

The Florida wind mitigation inspection process is the formal mechanism by which these discounts are calculated. After your new roof is installed and permitted, a licensed wind mitigation inspector evaluates your home against a standardized OIR-B1-1802 form, assessing factors like roof covering, roof deck attachment, roof-to-wall connection, roof shape, and opening protection. A modern architectural shingle or tile system installed by Premier Impact Windows & Roofing to current Florida Building Code standards in Laud Lakes will typically qualify for credits in the roof covering and deck attachment categories at minimum — often resulting in measurable annual savings that translate to thousands of dollars over the life of the roof.

For homeowners in the 33319 ZIP code whose current roof was installed before 2002, it's worth noting that many insurers have become increasingly reluctant to write or renew policies on older roofs, particularly those approaching 15 to 20 years of age. A new roof from Premier Impact Windows & Roofing doesn't just reduce your premium — it may be the factor that keeps your home insurable at all. Our team can walk you through the wind mitigation process, help you understand what credits to expect from your specific installation, and coordinate with your insurance carrier to ensure you receive every discount you've earned.

faqs.q: How do I know if my Laud Lakes home needs a full roof replacement or just repairs?
faqs.a: The best way to determine this is through a professional roof inspection. In Laud Lakes, where more than half of homes were built before 1994, many roofs are operating past their designed lifespan. Signs that often indicate a full replacement is more cost-effective than repairs include widespread granule loss on shingles, multiple areas of cracked or missing tile, sagging decking, recurring leaks in different locations, or a roof that's more than 15 to 20 years old. Premier Impact Windows & Roofing offers free assessments to help you make the right call.

faqs.q: What does roofing financing look like for a Laud Lakes homeowner, and who qualifies?
faqs.a: Premier Impact Windows & Roofing offers flexible financing starting at $87 per month with $0 down options available for qualified applicants. Most homeowners with reasonable credit history can qualify. Financing allows you to address an urgent roofing need immediately rather than waiting until damage escalates and repair costs increase. During your free estimate, our team will walk you through available plans and help you find a payment structure that fits your budget.

faqs.q: Do I need a permit for a roof replacement in Laud Lakes, and does Premier Impact Windows & Roofing handle it?
faqs.a: Yes, a permit is required for all full roof replacements in Laud Lakes through the Broward County Building Division. Permits ensure that materials and installation methods meet Florida Building Code requirements for the local 170 mph wind zone. Premier Impact Windows & Roofing handles the entire permit process on your behalf — from application and document submission to scheduling the required field inspection. You don't have to navigate the county bureaucracy alone; we manage it as part of your project.

faqs.q: How long does a roof replacement typically take in Laud Lakes?
faqs.a: Most full roof replacements in Laud Lakes for a standard single-family home are completed in one to three days once materials are delivered and the permit is approved. The permit review process through Broward County typically takes one to two weeks, so total project timeline from contract signing to completion is generally two to four weeks. Weather can occasionally cause brief delays, but Premier Impact Windows & Roofing coordinates scheduling carefully to minimize disruptions and keep your project on track.

faqs.q: Will a new roof actually lower my homeowner's insurance in Laud Lakes?
faqs.a: In most cases, yes — significantly. A new hurricane-rated roof installed to current Florida Building Code standards qualifies for wind mitigation credits under Florida law. Broward County homeowners with qualifying roofs routinely see annual premium reductions ranging from several hundred to over a thousand dollars depending on the carrier and specific construction features. After installation, a licensed wind mitigation inspector documents your roof's compliance using the standard OIR-B1-1802 form, which is submitted to your insurance carrier to trigger the discounts. Premier Impact Windows & Roofing can explain what credits your specific installation is likely to generate.

cta_body: Contact Premier Impact Windows & Roofing today for your free roofing estimate — our in-house experts are ready to assess your Laud Lakes home, explain your options, and get your project permitted and underway with financing starting at just $87/month.
